csvPropertyValue.csvvalue: scType + " " + scContent + " " + scFiberTradeName + " " + scWeight + " " + scWeightUOM + scDOtherYarnSize

csvBeginConstraintDefView.csvruleData: DATA|java.lang.Boolean|false , DATA|java.lang.String|sccomfortstretch , DATA|java.lang.String|scrigid , DATA|java.lang.String|scstretch , DATA|java.lang.String|scsuperstretch , DATA|java.lang.String|scknit
